word: H3996 - מָבֹוא - mâbôwʼ - maw-bo' - By which came

sections.paragraph:
Original: מבוא

Transliteration: mâbô'

Phonetic: maw-bo'

BDB Definition:

  1. entrance, a coming in, entering
  2. sunset
    1. sunset
    2. sunset, west

Origin: from H935

TWOT entry: 212b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
